goal: is_trivial_group_hom_kernel[G, H](f) = forall(x0: G) { f.hom(x0) = H.1 implies x0 = G.1 }

p.c: function[T0: Group, T1: Group](x0: GroupHom[T0, T1]) { forall(x1: T0) { T1.1 != x0.hom(x1) or T0.1 = x1 } = is_trivial_group_hom_kernel[T0, T1](x0) }[G, H](f)

f.hom(a) = H.1

not is_trivial_group_hom_kernel[G, H](f) or forall(x0: G) { H.1 != f.hom(x0) or G.1 = x0 } = true

goal: is_trivial_add_group_hom_kernel[A, B](f) = forall(x0: A) { f.hom(x0) = B.0 implies x0 = A.0 }

p.c: function[T0: AddGroup, T1: AddGroup](x0: AddGroupHom[T0, T1]) { forall(x1: T0) { T1.0 != x0.hom(x1) or T0.0 = x1 } = is_trivial_add_group_hom_kernel[T0, T1](x0) }[A, B](f)
is_injective_fn[A, B](f.hom) and B.0 = f.hom(a)

goal: is_trivial_ring_hom_kernel[R, S](f) = forall(x0: R) { f.hom(x0) = S.0 implies x0 = R.0 }

p.c: function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: RingHom[T0, T1]) { forall(x1: T0) { T1.0 != x0.hom(x1) or T0.0 = x1 } = is_trivial_ring_hom_kernel[T0, T1](x0) }[R, S](f)
